sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n20326" key="bombw/n" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βομβών</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ῶνος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, late form for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">βονβών</foreign>, Moeris<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">94</biblScope></bibl>, Hdn.Gr.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.23</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.483</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
